title: Cancel a non-retryable error (4xx) vs retrying 5xx
prompt: Write `MyApp.Workers.GithubFetchWorker` (queue `:github`, max_attempts 5). perform/1 takes `%{"repo" => repo}` and calls `MyApp.Github.fetch_issues(repo)`. On `{:error, %{status: status}}` where status is 400..499 (except 429), return `{:cancel, {:client_error, status}}`. On 429 return `{:snooze, 60}`. On 5xx or network errors return `{:error, reason}`. Happy path returns `:ok`. Write to `lib/my_app/workers/github_fetch_worker.ex`.
tier_rationale: Needs the full return-value ladder plus the 4xx vs 5xx distinction, but each branch is one line.
